LanguageData.DW_StubberAmmoLight.label: Heavy stubber bullet
LanguageData.DW_TwinLinkedHeavyStubber_V.label: Twin-Linked Heavy Stubber MkV
LanguageData.DW_TwinLinkedHeavyStubber_V.description: Heavy stubbers are projectile weapons similar in appearance and effect to an M2-era heavy machine gun, firing large-calibre bullets able to stop a man dead in his tracks. They are inferior in penetration to a boltgun (being stopped by anything heavier than Flak armour) they compensate through sheer volume of fire.
LanguageData.DW_LorenzKickbackPellet.label: Pellet
LanguageData.DW_LorenzKickback.label: Lorenz Kickback
LanguageData.DW_LorenzKickback.description: Utilizes a single giant cartridge to inflict devastation either to hordes or single targets.
LanguageData.DW_LorenzKickback.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_LorenzRumblerGrenade.label: Grenade
LanguageData.DW_LorenzRumbler.label: Lorenz Rumbler
LanguageData.DW_LorenzRumbler.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_GauntletGrenade.label: GauntletGrenade
LanguageData.DW_Grenadier_Gauntlet.label: Blastoom Mk III Grenadier Gauntlet
LanguageData.DW_Grenadier_Gauntlet.description: Grenades can be launched with relative precision once a wielder braces and aims. Otherwise it makes an excellent club.
LanguageData.DW_Grenadier_Gauntlet.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_StubberAmmoHeavy_II.label: Heavy stubber bullet
LanguageData.DW_HeavyStubber_II.label: AchlysHeavy Stubber Mk II
LanguageData.DW_HeavyStubber_II.description: The complicated accelerator mechanism that surrounds the barrel of this weapon helps propel the massive ammunition to incredible speeds. This, predictably, results in a bigger bang and more destruction. Understandably, this pleases the Ogryns.
LanguageData.DW_HeavyStubber_II.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_RipperGun_Pellet.label: Pellet
LanguageData.DW_Ripper_Gun_V.label: Foe-Rend Mk V Ripper Gun
LanguageData.DW_Ripper_Gun_V.description: A rare pattern of ripper gun, the Foe-Rend Mk V was an attempt to use a tightly focussed scatter shell to improve the Ogryns' aim at long range. Given the Ogryn propensity for charging wildly into combat, the experiment was quickly abandoned.
LanguageData.DW_Ripper_Gun_V.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_Slab_Shield_II.label: Orox Mk II Battle Maul and Slab Shield
LanguageData.DW_Slab_Shield_II.description: Simple but effective, a slab shield turns an Ogryn into a wall of walking cover, near impervious to enemy attacks.
LanguageData.DW_Slab_Shield_II.tools.0.label: slash
LanguageData.DW_Slab_Shield_II.tools.1.label: bash
LanguageData.DW_Bully_Club_IIIb.label: "Brunt's Basher" Mk IIIb Bully Club
LanguageData.DW_Bully_Club_IIIb.tools.0.label: slash
LanguageData.DW_Krourk_Cleaver_IV.label: Krourk Mk IV Cleaver
LanguageData.DW_Krourk_Cleaver_IV.description: A heavy slashing weapon, devastating in the hands of an enraged Ogryn.
LanguageData.DW_Krourk_Cleaver_IV.tools.0.label: slash
LanguageData.DW_PowerMaul_I.label: Achlys Mk I Power Maul
LanguageData.DW_PowerMaul_I.description: This model is sized for Ogryns, who are much better able to handle kickback from the power field. The thunderclap as it impacts is truly terrifying and will cause foes nearby to briefly cower.
LanguageData.DW_PowerMaul_I.tools.0.label: smash
